visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a gray flat cap and silver-framed glasses lies relaxed on a white sofa. He wears a gray sweatshirt and is intently looking at a silver iPhone held in his hands. Behind his head is a red rectangular pillow designed like a vintage game controller. The lighting is soft and even indoor light. (2) The scene cuts to a graphic animation featuring a yellow taxi driving through a tunnel of neon pink and blue light rings. A small circular inset in the bottom right shows the man from the first phase talking. This transitions to a flat 2D map animation with red location pins dropping onto it. (3) A screen recording of an iPhone interface appears, showing the Settings menu. The user navigates from 'General' to 'Keyboard' and then into 'Text Replacement.' The circular inset of the man remains, showing him gesturing with his hands. (4) The screen displays a messaging app interface. A single phonetic character is typed, and a suggested phone number and long address string instantly appear. The man in the inset points forward enthusiastically. (5) The video ends with a shot of the man back on the sofa, holding the phone and looking directly into the camera with a smile, pointing his finger towards the viewer.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Variety]: 老闆! (2) [Subtitle]: 都花多少時間? (3) [Subtitle]: 不到三秒! [Subtitle]: 我現在教你 iPhone 替代文字的秘技. (4) [Subtitle]: 出國要叫車, 這樣設定方便快速. (5) [Subtitle]: 不只是地址, 你的飛機航班, 甚至於手機號碼, email 都可以. (6) [Variety]: 打出來! 一秒快速. (7) [Subtitle]: 你只要點開 設定>一般>鍵盤>替代文字. (8) [Subtitle]: 點擊右上角 +, 輸入文字跟代碼. (9) [Subtitle]: 注音符號 ㄉ, ㄓ, ㄌ 都可以. (10) [Subtitle]: 不只出國, 日常生活也很好用. (11) [Subtitle]: 這麼方便的技巧, 還不趕快分享給你的朋友吧.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator appearing on camera and in an inset circle.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses, wearing a gray flat cap and a gray sweatshirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting with a white sofa and curtains, transitioning to stylized 3D animations of a taxi and a 2D map, followed by a screen recording of an iOS mobile interface.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice asks an energetic question. High-tempo electronic BGM kicks in immediately with a sharp 4/4 beat. (2) A quick 'whoosh' sound marks the transition as the main male narrator begins a rapid, enthusiastic explanation. The vocal clarity is high with professional broadcasting quality. (3) As the tutorial begins, distinct digital 'pop' and 'click' sound effects are audible, perfectly timed with visual UI interactions. The BGM maintains a steady, upbeat energy. (4) Short 'stinger' effects emphasize specific technical terms. The narrator's speech rate is fast but well-enunciated. (5) A final rising 'riser' effect leads into the concluding call-to-action, where the music swells slightly before a clean hard cut to silence at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To educate iPhone users on a productivity shortcut ('Text Replacement') that saves time when typing repetitive information like addresses or phone numbers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Tutorial for a built-in OS feature, no specific sponsorship mentioned.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality tech content with professional editing, using mixed media (live action, animation, screen capture) to maintain viewer engagement.
